document: YONKERS — The City Council voted 5-2 on Thursday to approve a new mixed-use development on the former industrial site along the Saw Mill River. The project, which includes 240 market-rate apartments and ground-floor retail, has been debated for three years. Supporters cited the tax base; opponents raised traffic concerns. Construction is expected to begin next fall.
